title: Sumar Moonji Kumaru Lyrics Bruce Lee
stanzas: <div>Bruce Lee Sumar Moonji Kumaru Song Lyrics

thaaru thagara dappaa
sumar moonji kumaru
kurukka pesidaadha
konjam neram summarru

summana scena pottu
enga kitta kaattaadha
naangale karuppu gulla
palaya padam ottaadhe

pachcha pulla enna ippo
baashaavathan aakki putta
goyyaala

attu malaa irundha enna
gettup ellaam maathivittu
hit-tu aalaa maathiputtaale

yeda kodum
seena podum
gaana paadam da

en gaana-vula
karutha kelu
nalla paadam da

kavaa moodu
gammunu keda
kayya udaatha

ye kachchaa muchchaa
echcha kudi
vaaya udaatha

suththala karula katta
kannaalaye urula vitta
kaaththaadi pola naanum
buildup la perala vutten

meyyaaluma kelu machchaan
maja scene-nu aalu machchaan
chinna-thula don-u machchaan
naan super star-u fan-u machchaan

atta kaththi mokka kathi
jigidi kattidaa
naan saanavathaan
pudikkaadha
sharppu kaththi daa

thadiye edukkaadha

naa bat-te thottu
paarkkaadha
Tendukar-ru daa

thavvulunda irukkundhunu
erumba poi nasukkula
kaadhukulla poondhukinna
kayya vuttu kasakkura

atom bomb-u
sounda kaettu
alarinu oduvadaa

epudi neeyum engakitta
ondikondi modhuvadaa

silpaaana sarikku vidum
saanaa kallu daa
en body oru
jarkkaa vaathaa
paenaa mulludaa

vartha meenu
odamba vachchu
vala aattuven

naan orey oru
kaisaa maala
vela kaattuven

seo.title: Sumar Moonji Kumaru Lyrics Bruce Lee
seo.description: Full Sumar Moonji Kumaru songs lyrics, Bruce Lee Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Gana Vinoth, Music: Ganesan Sekar, Singer(s): Simbu.
seo.keywords: Gana Vinoth, Bruce Lee, Ganesan Sekar, Simbu, Sumar Moonji Kumaru full lyrics, Bruce Lee songs lyrics, Sumar Moonji Kumaru lyrics snippets, Sumar Moonji Kumaru WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Sumar Moonji Kumaru lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sumar Moonji Kumaru?

The song conveys a lively and carefree attitude, celebrating fun moments and the joy of life.

What is the plot context of the movie Bruce Lee?

The movie revolves around action and comedy, showcasing the adventures of the protagonist, which aligns with the energetic vibe of the song.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Simbu, known for his unique style and energetic performances.

Who composed the music for Sumar Moonji Kumaru?

The music is composed by Ganesan Sekhar, who brings a vibrant sound to the track.

When was Sumar Moonji Kumaru released?

The song was released on October 21, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sumar Moonji Kumaru, the lively beats and catchy lyrics encapsulate the essence of youthful exuberance and carefree fun. Featured in the movie Bruce Lee, the song serves as a celebration of life and joy, perfectly matching the film's energetic tone. Simbu's vibrant vocals combined with Ganesan Sekhar's upbeat composition create an infectious atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This track is not just a song; it's an anthem for parties and celebrations, evoking feelings of happiness and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sumar Moonji Kumaru from the movie Bruce Lee is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration and joy. With Simbu's dynamic vocals and Ganesan Sekhar's vibrant music, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the catchy beats and lively lyrics that make this a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Bruce Lee Sumar Moonji Kumaru Song Lyrics
Don't talk nonsense, just relax for a while.
Don't show us a boring scene; we are not the old folks who watch old movies.
What happened to the green fields? Now it's all about the language.
From the big flower, I've changed everything to hit; I've changed the way I do things.
What a tough song this is!
Listen to my song; it's a good one.
Don't close your eyes; keep your hands open.
Don't cover your mouth with your hands.
Like a rolling stone, I too have grown in stature.
Listen carefully, my friend; it's a great scene. I'm a superstar fan.
Don't take the knife lightly; I'm not someone who likes to be hurt.
Don't be lazy; I'm not someone who just looks around.
Even if there are troubles, I will push through.

How can you come here and act like nothing happened?
The real art is in the body; my body is like a rock.
I will catch the fish with my words.
I will show you a unique necklace.
